title: polypodium polypodioides var. burchellii
intro: Polypodium polypodioides var. burchellii, also known as Cape fern or Cape ivy, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium polypodioides var. burchellii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
